content:
# Well Test

**Summary**: A method of evaluating the properties of a reservoir by measuring pressure and flow rates in a well.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-al-nemer|Al-Nemer, 2013]] analyzed well tests to determine reservoir parameters using optimization algorithms.

## Scientific Context

- [[2013-al-nemer|Al-Nemer, 2013]] Primary method for characterizing complex reservoirs.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2013-al-nemer|Al-Nemer, 2013]] Pressure and flow rate measurements.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Optimization was used to solve the non-linear problems inherent in dual porosity well test analysis. ([[2013-al-nemer|Al-Nemer, 2013, p. 68]])
